Headline: #95 95th, #108 Halsted/95th & #112Vincennes/111th Temporary Reroute near 95th/Perry
ShortDescription: 95 95th, 108 Halsted/95th & 112Vincennes/111th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near 95th/Perry, due to street blockage near 95th/Perry.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How will this affect my trip?

 

#95 95th, #108 Halsted/95th & #112Vincennes/111th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near 95th/Perry, due to street blockage near 95th/Perry.

Westbound #95 95th & #112 Vincennes/111th buses will operate via 95th, State, 87th, Halsted, 95th and over regular route.

Southbound #108 Halsted/95th buses will operate via 95th, State, 87th, Halsted, 95th and over regular route.

Allow extra travel time.
